things.name: King John's Castle
things.description: Impressive 13th-century Anglo-Norman castle on King's Island in the heart of the city

things.name: Bunratty Castle & Folk Park
things.description: Restored 15th-century castle with medieval banquets and open-air folk museum

things.name: Hunt Museum
things.description: Remarkable private collection including works by Picasso, Renoir and da Vinci

things.name: St Mary's Cathedral
things.description: Romanesque cathedral dating to 1168, the oldest building still in use in Limerick

things.name: Adare Village
things.description: One of Ireland's prettiest villages with thatched cottages and medieval priories

things.name: Milk Market
things.description: Vibrant weekend market in a Victorian building with local produce and crafts

things.name: Lough Gur
things.description: Mysterious horseshoe-shaped lake with one of the finest Neolithic stone circles in Ireland

things.name: Limerick City Gallery of Art
things.description: Permanent collection of Irish art from 1800 to the present day

things.name: Foynes Flying Boat Museum
things.description: Birthplace of Irish coffee and the golden age of transatlantic flight

things.name: Curraghchase Forest Park
things.description: Tranquil forest park with arboretum and the ruins of the de Vere estate
